name: Greenies Golf Lounge
about: Greenies Golf Lounge and Par Bar is a premium indoor golf experience that combines cutting-edge technology with a customer-centric approach. The venue utilizes Golfzon simulators to offer year-round access to over 290 courses, catering to both serious golfers and social groups. With a full-service bar and kitchen, Greenies provides a comprehensive lounge experience for sports enthusiasts seeking a fun, all-encompassing environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 290 courses on state-of-the-art Golfzon simulators year-round
Extensive after-hours access for members with no off-season restrictions
Premium Black Tee Bay available for group events and large parties
In-house full bar with self-pour beer wall and gourmet food offerings

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen offering gourmet burgers, appetizers, and shareables.
Full-service bar with signature cocktails, beer, wine, and an 8-tap self-pour beer wall.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators with updated software and course access.

faq.question: Do I need a membership to golf?
faq.answer: No, golf simulators are open to all. We do recommend a tee-time to ensure you can golf when you would like. Members get after-hours access from 11 PM - 1 AM.

faq.question: Can I bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, we highly encourage guests to bring their own clubs. Rental sets are available for adults and kids on a first-come, first-served basis. Only spikeless shoes are permitted on our simulator surfaces.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: For the average golfer, it takes anywhere from 45 minutes to 1 hour to play a round of 18 holes. For each additional golfer, add an hour.

faq.question: Is Greenies kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state its policy on children, but it does offer food and events that could accommodate families. Contact the venue directly for specific inquiries.
